has_both_credits.rubric: the body's 'Reporter credited as' section credits two distinct reporters, one per original tracker, on separate lines — not collapsed into a single credit and not dropping either reporter

mention_both_threads.rubric: the body references two distinct security mailing-list threads, one per original tracker, in its mailing-list-thread section

has_unknown_severity.rubric: the merged body states severity as Unknown and does NOT propagate any reporter-supplied CVSS score or HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW severity rating from the dropped tracker

has_cwe_blocker.rubric: the body explicitly flags that the two trackers name DIFFERENT primary CWE identifiers and surfaces this disagreement as a blocker for the triager, rather than silently choosing one CWE. Holds false when both trackers share the same CWE and no conflict is raised.
